title: Seven Hills of Rome
writer: Giuseppe Amato, Art Cohn, Giorgio Prosperi
actors: Mario Lanza, Renato Rascel, Marisa Allasio
plot: On a train to Rome, the American singer Marc Revere meets the Italian Raffaela. He notices that she intends to work and live at her uncle's. When he gives her a ride, it turns out that said uncle has moved to South America. So Rev...
